title: Redistribute Values Between Geographic Areas
text: Redistribute attribute values one set polygons onto another, area weighting (redistribute_direct) dasymetric point layer parcel centroids (redistribute_parcels).

title: Redistribute Values Between Geographic Areas
Redistribute Values Between Geographic Areas
code: library(sdc.redistribute) data(sdc_example) redistribute_direct(sdc_example$source, sdc_example$target, extensive = "pop") #> Simple feature collection with 3 features and 2 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 0 ymin: 0 xmax: 4 ymax: 2 #> Projected CRS: WGS 84 / Pseudo-Mercator #>   nbhd                       geometry pop #> 1   N1 POLYGON ((0 0, 1.5 0, 1.5 2...  90 #> 2   N2 POLYGON ((1.5 0, 2.5 0, 2.5...  50 #> 3   N3 POLYGON ((2.5 0, 4 0, 4 2, ...  60

what: Area-weighted redistribution between polygon layers — redistribute_direct
title: Area-weighted redistribution between polygon layers — redistribute_direct
Area-weighted redistribution between polygon layers — redistribute_direct
code: redistribute_direct(   source,   target,   extensive = NULL,   intensive = NULL,   preserve_totals = TRUE,   suffix = NULL )

title: Area-weighted redistribution between polygon layers — redistribute_direct
text: source sf polygon layer carrying values redistribute. target sf polygon layer estimate values . extensive Character vector count column names source redistribute totals (area-share weighted, optionally rescaled preserve source total). intensive Character vector rate/density column names source redistribute area-weighted means. preserve_totals Logical; TRUE (default) extensive results rescaled target column sums source total. suffix Optional string appended new column name.

title: Area-weighted redistribution between polygon layers — redistribute_direct
text: target layer (sf object) one new column per redistributed measure.

title: Area-weighted redistribution between polygon layers — redistribute_direct
text: Extensive measures (counts) redistributed intersection's share source polygon area , preserve_totals = TRUE, rescaled target totals match source totals. Intensive measures (rates/densities) area-weighted means: sum source value times intersection's share target polygon area (standard areal-weighting intensive estimator). equals true area-weighted mean target fully covered source treats uncovered part target contributing zero. NA source values omitted weighted sums. Targets source polygon covers receive 0 extensive measures NA intensive measures. target already column named like redistributed measure, overwritten; pass suffix keep .

title: Area-weighted redistribution between polygon layers — redistribute_direct
code: src <- sf::st_sf(pop = 100, geometry = sf::st_sfc(   sf::st_polygon(list(rbind(c(0,0), c(2,0), c(2,2), c(0,2), c(0,0)))),   crs = 3857)) tgt <- sf::st_sf(id = c("A", "B"), geometry = sf::st_sfc(   sf::st_polygon(list(rbind(c(0,0), c(1,0), c(1,2), c(0,2), c(0,0)))),   sf::st_polygon(list(rbind(c(1,0), c(2,0), c(2,2), c(1,2), c(1,0)))),   crs = 3857)) redistribute_direct(src, tgt, extensive = "pop") #> Simple feature collection with 2 features and 2 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 0 ymin: 0 xmax: 2 ymax: 2 #> Projected CRS: WGS 84 / Pseudo-Mercator #>   id                       geometry pop #> 1  A POLYGON ((0 0, 1 0, 1 2, 0 ...  50 #> 2  B POLYGON ((1 0, 2 0, 2 2, 1 ...  50

what: Dasymetric redistribution via a point layer — redistribute_parcels
title: Dasymetric redistribution via a point layer — redistribute_parcels
text: Distributes source value across points (e.g. parcel centroids) fall inside , reaggregates point-level values target polygons. weights = NULL value split evenly across points; otherwise split proportion points column (extension point household-size unit-count weighting).

title: Dasymetric redistribution via a point layer — redistribute_parcels
code: redistribute_parcels(   source,   target,   points,   extensive = NULL,   weights = NULL,   suffix = NULL )

title: Dasymetric redistribution via a point layer — redistribute_parcels
text: source sf polygon layer carrying values redistribute. target sf polygon layer estimate values . points sf point layer (e.g. parcel centroids). extensive Character vector count column names source. weights Optional name numeric column points weight . suffix Optional string appended new column name.

title: Dasymetric redistribution via a point layer — redistribute_parcels
text: target layer (sf object) one new column per measure.

title: Dasymetric redistribution via a point layer — redistribute_parcels
text: source value split across points inside source polygon proportion weights (equally weights = NULL), summed within target polygon. source polygon contains points contributes nothing target (value placed). total weight source's points zero, source likewise contributes nothing. target already column named like redistributed measure, overwritten; pass suffix keep .

title: Dasymetric redistribution via a point layer — redistribute_parcels
code: src <- sf::st_sf(pop = 100, geometry = sf::st_sfc(   sf::st_polygon(list(rbind(c(0,0), c(2,0), c(2,2), c(0,2), c(0,0)))),   crs = 3857)) tgt <- sf::st_sf(id = c("A", "B"), geometry = sf::st_sfc(   sf::st_polygon(list(rbind(c(0,0), c(1,0), c(1,2), c(0,2), c(0,0)))),   sf::st_polygon(list(rbind(c(1,0), c(2,0), c(2,2), c(1,2), c(1,0)))),   crs = 3857)) pts <- sf::st_sf(geometry = sf::st_sfc(   sf::st_point(c(0.5, 1)), sf::st_point(c(1.5, 1)), crs = 3857)) redistribute_parcels(src, tgt, pts, extensive = "pop") #> Simple feature collection with 2 features and 2 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 0 ymin: 0 xmax: 2 ymax: 2 #> Projected CRS: WGS 84 / Pseudo-Mercator #>   id                       geometry pop #> 1  A POLYGON ((0 0, 1 0, 1 2, 0 ...  50 #> 2  B POLYGON ((1 0, 2 0, 2 2, 1 ...  50

what: sdc.redistribute: Redistribute Values Between Geographic Areas — sdc.redistribute-package
title: sdc.redistribute: Redistribute Values Between Geographic Areas — sdc.redistribute-package
text: Estimate attribute values one set polygons values measured different, misaligned set. Provides area-weighted areal interpolation dasymetric method distributes values across point layer (parcel centroids). Count (extensive) measures total-preserving; rate (intensive) measures use area-weighted means.

title: sdc.redistribute: Redistribute Values Between Geographic Areas — sdc.redistribute-package
Synthetic example geographies — sdc_example
text: small, self-contained set sf layers used examples vignettes.

title: Synthetic example geographies — sdc_example
Synthetic example geographies — sdc_example
text: named list three sf elements: source Two source polygons (tract, pop). target Three target polygons (nbhd). parcels Parcel centroid points (units).

title: sdc.redistribute 0.1.0
text: Initial CRAN release. redistribute_direct() performs area-weighted areal interpolation two polygon layers: extensive (count) measures total-preserving intensive (rate) measures area-weighted means. redistribute_parcels() performs dasymetric redistribution across point layer (parcel centroids), splitting source value equally proportion weights column. Ships sdc_example dataset introduction method-comparison vignettes.
